title: Tempo of the Shift
description: The Tempo of the Shift materializes when the shift bell rings in the manufactory district. It has been running shifts since before anyone arrived.

steps.text: The bell rang at the exact moment the party reached the junction between the manufactory district and the transport yards. Not a clock bell. A shift bell. The kind that does not ring to tell you the time but to tell you that your time has come.

lines.speaker: Tempo of the Shift
lines.text: Everyone is a worker here. The shift does not distinguish between residents and intruders. You are present. Presence is participation. CLOCK IN.

lines.speaker: Tempo of the Shift
lines.text: The bell does not wait. The bell rang. The shift has begun. You will work or you will be worked around.

lines.speaker: Tempo of the Shift
lines.text: It is not fine. Irregularities in the flow disrupt output. You are an irregularity. The Warden's report was very clear on this point.

lines.speaker: Tempo of the Shift
lines.text: CLOCK OUT is at the end of the shift. The shift ends when I say it ends. It has not ended since before the gears were installed. The gears were installed to track the shift, not to replace it.

lines.speaker: Tempo of the Shift
lines.text: Not yet. Today may be different. CLOCK IN.
